why.title: Why this exists
why.problemText1: Creating tokens is easy. Understanding them isn't.
why.problemText2: Most tokens launch without context: no official links, no clear description, no history, no community review — and trust collapses.
why.solutionText1: A verified profile layer for every token.
why.solutionText2: Axiome Launch adds project pages, token passports, community discussion, and transparent economics — so good projects stand out.

features.title: What you can do on Axiome Launch
features.subtitle: Everything a token needs to build trust — from creation to community feedback.

overview.title: Axiome Startup Ecosystem
overview.subtitle: A multi-project Web3 ecosystem on Axiome blockchain. Each project has its own token — LAUNCH ties them all together.
overview.description: We build independent products inside the Axiome ecosystem. Our first live project is Heads or Tails — a PvP game on AXM. LAUNCH is the ecosystem token: stakers earn 20% of commission from each project. Token discovery, community, and governance — all in one place.
overview.card1Desc: Live PvP game on AXM — 50/50, instant results
overview.card2Desc: Ecosystem token — earn revenue from all projects
overview.card3Desc: Propose ideas, vote, and shape the ecosystem

coinflip.title: Heads or Tails
coinflip.subtitle: PvP coin flip game on Axiome blockchain. Two players bet AXM, one creates a bet and the other accepts — winner takes 90%, 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.howDesc: Simple 50/50 mechanics powered by commit-reveal scheme. The creator's choice is sealed on-chain as a hash. When an opponent accepts, the result is determined and paid out instantly in a single atomic transaction.
coinflip.step1Desc: Deposit AXM to your game vault. This is your in-game balance for betting.
coinflip.step2Desc: Set your bet amount in AXM and create a bet. Or browse open bets and accept one with a single click.
coinflip.step3Desc: When a bet is accepted, the smart contract verifies the creator's secret, determines the winner, and distributes the payout — all in one atomic transaction. No delays.
coinflip.step4Desc: Winner receives 90% of the total pot. 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.step5Desc: Invite friends via referral link — earn up to 25% of treasury from your referrals' games across 3 levels.
coinflip.commissionDesc: 10% of each pot goes as platform commission. Winner gets 90% of the total.
coinflip.securityDesc: All logic is on-chain via CosmWasm smart contract. Commit-reveal scheme ensures provable fairness — no one can cheat. Funds are locked in the contract until the result is determined.
coinflip.paramRevealTimeout: Bet expiration: auto-cancel after 3 hours if not accepted
coinflip.paramOneClick: Account activation: one-time Authz delegation for 30 days (no signature per game)
coinflip.coinTokenDesc: COIN is a CW20 utility token on Axiome blockchain. Use COIN for in-game features: shop purchases, cosmetics, lottery and contest participation, creating giveaways, and more. Bets are placed in native AXM.
coinflip.referralDesc: Earn a share of the treasury when your referrals play. 3-level system (% of 10% commission):
coinflip.eventsDesc: The platform hosts regular contests and raffles with real AXM prizes. Contests count your bets automatically — just play. Raffles require clicking 'Join'. Prizes are funded from the treasury (10% commission).

token.title: LAUNCH Token & Staking
token.subtitle: LAUNCH is the ecosystem revenue token. Stake LAUNCH to earn AXM from all project commissions. 100M total supply, CW20 on Axiome blockchain.

allProducts.title: Revenue share
allProducts.desc: 20% of commission distributed to stakers as AXM. More projects = more revenue.

governance.title: Governance
governance.desc: Vote on new projects, grants, and ecosystem decisions.

ecosystem.title: Staking model
ecosystem.desc: Synthetix reward_per_token: fair, proportional, gas-efficient. No lock period — unstake anytime.

staking.title: LAUNCH Staking
staking.subtitle: Stake LAUNCH tokens and earn a share of revenue from all ecosystem projects. Rewards are distributed as native AXM.
staking.step1Desc: Send LAUNCH tokens to the staking contract. No lock period — unstake anytime.
staking.step2Desc: 20% of game commission is sent to the staking contract as AXM.
staking.step3Desc: Rewards accumulate proportionally to your stake. Claim anytime — no vesting, no delays.
staking.revenueDesc: Currently: 20% of commission from every Heads or Tails game. As more projects launch, revenue grows proportionally.
staking.modelDesc: Uses Synthetix reward_per_token model — O(1) gas cost regardless of staker count. Proportional, transparent, on-chain.

vision.title: Long-term vision
vision.text: We're building a sustainable multi-project Web3 ecosystem. Each product (like Heads or Tails) has its own token and economy. LAUNCH holders benefit from every project's success. No hype — real products, real revenue, real value.

disclaimer.text: LAUNCH is an ecosystem revenue token. COIN is a utility token for in-game features. Bets are placed in AXM. Gaming involves risk — only bet what you can afford to lose. We do not promise returns. Play responsibly.

hero.title: Heads or Tails
hero.subtitle: PvP game on Axiome blockchain. Two players bet AXM on heads or tails. Winner takes 90% of the pot.
hero.desc: Complete game guide: from placing bets to VIP subscriptions, staking, and social features.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Everything you need to start — connect your wallet, fund your balance, and place your first bet.
gettingStarted.req1: Seed phrase (mnemonic) from your Axiome wallet — encrypted and stored only locally in your browser
gettingStarted.req2: Some AXM for gameplay and gas fees (~0.01 AXM per transaction)
gettingStarted.req3: COIN for extra features (VIP, chat, announcements) — buy in shop with AXM or earn through achievements
gettingStarted.connectStep1: Open the site and click "Connect Wallet"
gettingStarted.connectStep2: Enter your Axiome wallet seed phrase (mnemonic) — it is encrypted and stored only in your browser
gettingStarted.connectStep3: Done! You'll see your address and balance in the header
gettingStarted.first1: Fund your game balance — transfer AXM from your Axiome wallet to the game vault (smart contract)
gettingStarted.first2: Activate 1-Click Play — one-time permission for the contract to execute game operations on your behalf
gettingStarted.first3: Create a bet or accept one — and start playing!
gettingStarted.note: Gas for game transactions (create, accept, cancel bets) is paid automatically via feegrant. AXM is needed for deposits, shop purchases, and staking.

mainPage.title: Main Page — Game
mainPage.subtitle: The heart of the app. Four tabs with full control over your game.
mainPage.tabDesc1: Open bets from other players that you can accept
mainPage.tabDesc3: Complete history of your games and transactions
mainPage.tabDesc4: Top players by wins, volume, and win rate
mainPage.element1: Top winner banner — latest big win
mainPage.element2: Jackpot banner — current prize pool and progress
mainPage.element3: Staking banner — total AXM paid to LAUNCH stakers
mainPage.element4: Bet creation form (desktop — right side, mobile — "+" button)
mainPage.note: On mobile, swipe left/right to switch between tabs.

createBet.title: Creating a Bet
createBet.step1: Tap the "+" button (mobile) or use the form on the right (desktop)
createBet.step2: Choose amount — quick buttons: 1, 5, 10, 50, 100, 500 AXM or custom amount
createBet.step4: Confirmation screen shows potential winnings, odds (50/50), and commission
createBet.step6: Bet sent! Blockchain confirmation takes 10–50 seconds
createBet.limit3: Bet auto-cancels after 3 hours if no one accepts

acceptBet.title: Accepting a Bet
acceptBet.step2: Choose the bet you want to accept
acceptBet.step4: Confirm — you need at least the bet amount on your balance
acceptBet.step5: Wait 10–50 seconds — you'll see the coin flip animation and result
acceptBet.tech1: When creating a bet, the server generates a random side + secret
acceptBet.tech2: Only the hash (commitment) is recorded on-chain — secret is hidden
acceptBet.tech3: On acceptance, accept_and_reveal is called — one atomic transaction
acceptBet.tech4: Smart contract verifies the hash, determines winner, distributes funds
acceptBet.tech5: Everything is transparent and verifiable on-chain

myBets.title: My Bets
myBets.subtitle: The "My Bets" tab has three sections.
myBets.openDesc: Your bets waiting for an opponent. Cancel, boost (move up in list, 3 free per day), or pin to hot.
myBets.inGameDesc: Bets being played right now. Duel animation — 3D coin flip and winner reveal.
myBets.resultsDesc: Recently completed games with result (win/loss) and payout amount.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top players in three sorting modes. Click a player to view their profile.

wallet.title: Wallet & Balance
wallet.subtitle: Manage your funds — deposit, withdraw, track balances.
wallet.balance1: AXM (blue) — native tokens for gameplay and transactions
wallet.balance2: COIN (green) — utility token for VIP, chat, announcements
wallet.balance3: Game balance — AXM in smart contract for betting
wallet.depositStep4: AXM will transfer from your Axiome wallet to the game vault (smart contract)
wallet.withdrawStep4: AXM will return to your Axiome wallet
wallet.note: If AXM on wallet is below 0.5, the indicator will pulse — top up for smooth gameplay.

shop.title: Shop — Buy COIN
shop.subtitle: COIN is a utility token for VIP, chat features, announcements, and events. Purchased with AXM.
shop.step1: Go to the "Shop" section via navigation
shop.step2: Choose a chest — the more expensive, the more COIN you get
shop.step3: Tap the chest card and confirm purchase (AXM will be deducted)
shop.step4: COIN will be credited to your balance
shop.note: Exact prices are shown on the shop page. "Popular" and "Best Value" badges highlight good deals.

stakingLaunch.title: Staking LAUNCH
stakingLaunch.subtitle: Stake LAUNCH tokens to earn passive income in AXM.
stakingLaunch.how1: 20% of commission from every bet goes to the staking pool
stakingLaunch.how2: The more LAUNCH you stake, the bigger your share of rewards
stakingLaunch.stakeStep1: Click the staking icon in the header
stakingLaunch.claimStep1: You'll see the "Pending Rewards" card with AXM amount
stakingLaunch.claimStep3: AXM will be sent to your wallet
stakingLaunch.unstakeStep3: Confirm — tokens will return to your wallet

vip.title: VIP Subscriptions
vip.subtitle: VIP gives in-game privileges. Paid in COIN. Access via crown icon in header.
vip.note: Subscription lasts 30 days (monthly) or 365 days (annual, ~15% discount). No auto-renewal.
vip.diamondCustom1: Name gradient — fire, ocean, aurora, sunset, neon, cosmic
vip.diamondCustom2: Frame style — conic-spin, double-ring, neon-pulse, fire-ring, galaxy
vip.diamondCustom3: Badge icon — crown, lightning, dragon, phoenix, star, skull

jackpot.title: Jackpot
jackpot.subtitle: Automatic prize draws from pools accumulated with every bet.
jackpot.how1: 10% of the treasury (10% commission) from every bet automatically goes to jackpot pools
jackpot.how2: When a pool reaches its threshold — a draw happens
jackpot.how3: Winner is chosen randomly among eligible players
jackpot.how4: Prize is instantly credited to the winner's balance
jackpot.note: Minimum number of games played is required for eligibility.

events.title: Events — Contests & Raffles
events.subtitle: Regular contests and raffles with real AXM prizes.
events.contestDesc: Participation is automatic — just play during the contest period.
events.contest1: Ranked by: bet volume, number of wins, P&L
events.raffleDesc: Click "Join" and pay the entry fee.
events.raffle3: Raffle seed is published for transparency
events.sponsorStep1: Click "Create Raffle" on the events page
events.sponsorStep2: Set title, description, and prize pool
events.sponsorStep4: The raffle will appear in the list for all players

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Unified feed of platform updates.
news.filterDesc4: When someone hits a big payout
news.note: Any user can place a sponsored announcement for COIN.

social.title: Social Features
social.subtitle: Chat, transfers, favorites, and online status.
social.chat3: Paid message styles for COIN: highlighted, pinned, super-chat
social.chat4: Effects for COIN: confetti, coins, fire
social.chat5: COIN Drop — drop COIN in chat for anyone to grab!
social.transferStep4: Confirm — funds are instantly credited to the recipient
social.favDesc: Add players to favorites for quick access. Online status is visible in user list (green = in game).

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.subtitle: Invite friends — earn a percentage of commission from their bets.
referral.howStep1: Open the profile menu in the header
referral.howStep2: Click the referral link or copy icon
referral.howStep3: Send the link to your friend
referral.howStep4: When your friend starts playing — you'll receive rewards
referral.note: Maximum 25% of treasury per bet goes to referral rewards.

profile.title: Profile & Achievements
profile.subtitle: Your stats, achievements, settings, and public profile.
profile.section2: Game stats — wins, losses, win rate, volume, P&L
profile.section4: VIP status — tier and expiry date
profile.achieveNote: Claim rewards for unlocked achievements by tapping "Claim".

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I fund my game balance?
faq.a1: Wallet → Deposit. AXM will transfer from your Axiome wallet to the game vault (smart contract).
faq.a2: AXM is the native currency of Axiome network. Get it on an exchange or from other users via transfer.
faq.a3: Commit-reveal scheme: a secret is generated when creating a bet, its hash is recorded on-chain. The secret is revealed only on acceptance. Smart contract verifies — cheating is impossible.
faq.a4: When you create or accept a bet, that amount is locked until the game ends. Locked funds cannot be withdrawn.
faq.a5: If no one accepts your bet within 3 hours, it auto-cancels and AXM is returned.
faq.a6: 10% of each pot goes to the treasury. Treasury breakdown: 20% → staking pool, 10% → jackpot, 25% → referral rewards, 45% → platform operations.
faq.a7: Yes. Permission is only for the CoinFlip contract with a limited set of game actions. The relayer cannot transfer your funds elsewhere.
faq.a8: Ecosystem staking token. Not to be confused with COIN (utility) and AXM (betting). Staking LAUNCH earns AXM income.
faq.a9: Utility token: VIP subscription, paid chat features, announcements, raffles, and changing referral branch.

footer.text: Heads or Tails — a fair PvP game on Axiome blockchain. Play, earn, stake!
